title: Align archive index ownership guard with PR audit

sources.reason: Ownership guard containing the unconditional archive-index modification rejection.
Existing PR audit behavior that accepts a generated archive index when Summary changedFiles declares it.
Regression-test location for ownership preview behavior.

problemStatement: The local ownership guard rejects every modified archive index even when the associated archived Summary explicitly declares the index as a generated changed file. This contradicts the PR audit and blocks valid archive evidence diffs.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A generated archive index declared by an archived Summary is excluded from unowned-path failures.
Existing archive immutability behavior still rejects modifications to archived Contract/Summary files.
No product documentation, archive evidence, schema, release, or runtime behavior changes.
scenarioCoverage.reason: This is a governance ownership-check correction only.

riskAssessment.reason: Narrow governance-check correction with focused regression coverage.

executionDecision.reason: Root cause, minimal fix, regression test, scope, and verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review that only generated archive index metadata is exempted, while archived Contract/Summary modifications remain append-only failures.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A regression test proves a Summary-declared generated archive index is not reported as unowned by the local ownership guard.
The guard continues to reject modified archived evidence files and all existing tests pass.
make check-ai AI_BASE_COMMIT=origin/main and make check-ai-pr AI_BASE_COMMIT=origin/main both pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The archive index is valid generated metadata when a Work Item Summary declares it, but the local diff ownership guard handles it differently from the PR audit and rejects it unconditionally.
constraints: Do not weaken the append-only rejection for archived Contract/Summary files.
Keep the change limited to the ownership guard and its regression test.
intent.rationale: The local guard and PR audit should apply the same evidence-based rule so valid generated index diffs can be retained without creating unowned-path false positives.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
